# os-hcl-design

> Apple-inspired design system codified as machine-readable context for AI coding agents. Foundations, DTCG v1 tokens, Tailwind v4 reference components, and composed patterns — authored for Claude Code and other AI consumers first, human readers second.

## Foundations

- [Principles](foundations/principles.md): Deference, Clarity, Depth plus the hard-constraint table (weights, accents, hit targets, contrast, reduced motion/transparency).
- [Typography](foundations/typography.md): `-apple-system` font stack, fluid type role scale (caption2 → hero-lg), hero tracking, weight discipline.
- [Color](foundations/color.md): semantic token roles (text, surface, separator, border, action, accent) with light/dark/high-contrast modes.
- [Spacing](foundations/spacing.md): 4/8pt scale, layout margins, section rhythm, 65ch body measure, bento grid gaps.
- [Motion](foundations/motion.md): duration + spring-easing tokens, reduced-motion contract, scroll-driven patterns.
- [Materials](foundations/materials.md): Liquid-Glass web approximation, three tiers, mandatory solid fallback, reduced-transparency contract.
- [Accessibility](foundations/accessibility.md): WCAG 2.1 AA, focus-visible rings, 44px hit targets, keyboard map, Dynamic Type equivalence.
- [Component template](foundations/component-template.md): canonical 11-section structure for every component/pattern `.md`.

## Tokens (DTCG v1 JSON)

- [Primitive tokens](tokens/primitive.tokens.json): 8 color ramps × 11 steps + spacing + radii + shadows + type scale + motion.
- [Semantic tokens](tokens/semantic.tokens.json): role-named aliases with light/dark/high-contrast mode extensions.
- [Component tokens](tokens/component.tokens.json): per-component overrides (semantic-only references).

## Components — Primitives

- [Button](components/button/button.md): primary/secondary/ghost/destructive × sm/md/lg, 44px floor, focus-visible ring.
- [IconButton](components/icon-button/icon-button.md): icon-only; aria-label enforced at the type level.
- [Input](components/input/input.md): native `<input>` with aria-invalid error state and sm/md/lg sizes.
- [Textarea](components/textarea/textarea.md): multi-line input, vertical-resize only.
- [Select](components/select/select.md): Radix combobox with portal listbox + type-ahead.
- [Checkbox](components/checkbox/checkbox.md): Radix checkbox; tri-state support.
- [Radio + RadioGroup](components/radio/radio.md): Radix radio-group with roving tabindex.
- [Switch](components/switch/switch.md): binary on/off toggle via Radix.
- [Badge](components/badge/badge.md): pill-shaped inert label with intent variants.
- [Avatar](components/avatar/avatar.md): `<img>` with auto-initials fallback; 4 sizes.

## Components — Overlays

- [Dialog](components/dialog/dialog.md): focus-trapped modal via Radix Dialog.
- [Popover](components/popover/popover.md): non-modal overlay via Radix Popover.
- [Tooltip](components/tooltip/tooltip.md): hover/focus hint via Radix Tooltip.
- [Toast](components/toast/toast.md): transient notification via Radix Toast.

## Components — Navigation / Disclosure

- [Nav](components/nav/nav.md): presentational `<nav>` + list + aria-current active state.
- [Tabs](components/tabs/tabs.md): Radix tabs with pill-shaped selected indicator.
- [Accordion](components/accordion/accordion.md): Radix accordion with chevron-rotate indicator.
- [Separator](components/separator/separator.md): horizontal/vertical rule.

## Components — Feedback

- [Alert](components/alert/alert.md): inline `role="alert"` with 5 intent variants.
- [Spinner](components/spinner/spinner.md): indeterminate loader; labelable via aria-label.
- [Progress](components/progress/progress.md): determinate or indeterminate progress bar.
- [Skeleton](components/skeleton/skeleton.md): animated loading placeholder.

## Patterns

- [Hero Feature Grid](patterns/hero-feature-grid/hero-feature-grid.md): sticky glass nav + display hero + bento grid.
- [Pricing](patterns/pricing/pricing.md): 3-tier comparison with featured tier badge + CTAs.
- [Auth Form](patterns/auth-form/auth-form.md): sign-in/sign-up with optional OAuth shoulder and inline error surface.
- [Empty State](patterns/empty-state/empty-state.md): centered icon + title + description + optional CTA.

## Quality gates

CI enforces: TypeScript strict, ESLint (raw-hex ban, no arbitrary values, no `dark:` prefixes in component code), stylelint (semantic tokens only), Prettier class ordering, depth-check (every component dir has all 5 sibling files), 11-section doc check, AGENTS.md ≤ 2048 bytes, WCAG token-contrast per mode, Storybook axe a11y pass, Playwright visual regression (default / dark / reduced-motion / reduced-transparency variants), CSS bundle < 15 KB gzip, keyboard activation + hit-target verification.
